task_completion.description: The tag 'submitted-2023' is created or visible in Zotero.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The tag 'submitted-2023' is visible in the Zotero tag selector pane (usually bottom-left) or in the Tags tab of the right-hand item pane.

task_completion.description: The target papers are tagged with 'submitted-2023'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should look for the 'submitted-2023' tag being applied to the papers. This can be seen in the right-hand 'Tags' tab when a paper is selected, or by a colored square next to the paper titles if a color was assigned to the tag.

task_completion.description: The export dialog is opened and configured for RIS format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Export...' dialog box in Zotero is visible, with the 'Format' dropdown set to 'RIS'.

task_completion.description: The collection is exported to the correct file path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save file dialog showing the name 'neurips_archive.ris' in the directory '/home/ga/Documents/', or a terminal/file manager window confirming the file exists at this path.
The 'NeurIPS 2023 Draft' collection is no longer visible in the left-hand collections pane of Zotero.

task_completion.description: The papers remain in the library after the collection is deleted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The papers ('Attention Is All You Need', 'BERT...', 'Language Models...') are still visible in the center pane when 'My Library' or 'Unfiled Items' is selected in the left pane.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Zotero GUI to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Zotero application open with menus, dialogs, or right-click context menus being actively used, rather than just terminal commands modifying the Zotero SQLite database.

integrity.description: The RIS file was generated via Zotero's export functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Zotero 'Export Collection' dialog and subsequent save dialog, rather than the agent manually creating a text file named 'neurips_archive.ris' and pasting text into it.

integrity.description: The agent deleted the collection without deleting the items.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should select 'Delete Collection...' (which keeps items in the library) rather than 'Delete Collection and Items...' in the Zotero context menu.
